name: NVZver
description: Vision — a personal, model-agnostic agentic engineering system. Domain-neutral core, on-demand packs.

plugins.name: lsa
plugins.description: Living Spec Architecture: spec-first methodology with eight skills (init, discover, specify, plan, verify, sync, reconcile, revise-constitution) and human User Verifications at every phase.

plugins.name: helper
plugins.description: Friendly fact-grounded assistant: `/help` slash command + auto-engaging subagent on user-friction signals (consecutive lsa-specify User Verification rejections, free-form `what is X?` mid-flow), with per-signal-type cooldown to prevent nag. Depends on `core` (output discipline) and `lsa` (User Verification reject signal).
